INSERT INTO workflow_events (client_id, workflow_name, event_type, payload)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $('Prep Input').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid,
    'research_agent',                                                           
    'triggered',
    '{"execution_id": "{{ $execution.id }}"}'::jsonb                            
  )

SELECT id, address, zip, result, created_at, expires_at
FROM research_cache
WHERE address = '{{ $('Prep Input').first().json.full_address }}'
  AND expires_at > now()
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO research_cache (address, zip, result)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Prep Input').first().json.full_address }}',
  '{{ $('Prep Input').first().json.zip }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
)

INSERT INTO workflow_events (client_id, workflow_name, event_type, payload)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Prep Input').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid,
  'research_agent',
  'completed',
  '{"execution_id": "{{ $execution.id }}"}'::jsonb
)
